_metadata.description: Effect-size parameters for Monte Carlo health-impact simulation
_metadata.project: MIT LiftLab 2026 — From Nanostores to Classrooms
_metadata.note: All sigma values derived from published 95% CIs assuming Normal: sigma = (UB - LB) / 3.92

nutrition_education_only.source: Silveira et al. 2013, Preventive Medicine. Meta-analysis of RCTs, N = 8722 children/adolescents

physical_activity_only.source: Cochrane systematic review of school-based interventions

physical_activity_plus_nutrition.source: Cochrane systematic review of school-based interventions
physical_activity_plus_nutrition.applies_to: Combined PA + nutrition (closest to our proposal)

adolescent_health_education_zscore.source: Brown et al. 2020, BMC Public Health. Adolescents 10-19 years

long_term_null_robustness.source: Hodder et al. 2021, Nutrients. Long-term school interventions 6-12 years

baseline_population._description: Starting BMI distribution for simulated cohort, parameterized from ENSANUT Continua 2020-2024
baseline_population.source: ENSANUT Continua 2020-2024 derived estimates; WHO BMI-for-age cut-offs
